title: T-014 — Lane suggestion API + IST freight-cost auto-suggest (§10A.3.1, §10A.3.3, V-MS-26)
prompt:
# T-014 — Lane suggestion API + IST freight-cost auto-suggest

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10A.3.1 (lane CRUD auto-suggest), §10A.3.3 (rate card approval gate), §11.6 V-MS-26
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Action / route handler that the IST create form (`ms_ist_create`) calls when both from_site and to_site are populated. Returns the best active lane + most recent active rate card for cost suggestion.

## Implementation contract
1. Server Action `suggestLane({orgId, fromSiteId, toSiteId})` in `apps/web/app/api/lanes/suggest/route.ts`:
   - Query `SELECT * FROM transport_lanes WHERE org_id=$1 AND from_site_id=$2 AND to_site_id=$3 AND active=true ORDER BY (most-recent-success-rate via JOIN to transfer_orders count) LIMIT 1`. Success-rate sort done client-side over a heuristic if MV unavailable; if no lane, return null.
   - If lane found, query `SELECT * FROM transport_lane_rate_cards WHERE lane_id=$1 AND approval_status='active' AND (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to >= CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC LIMIT 1` — V-MS-26 enforced via partial index from T-013.
   - Return `{ lane: LaneRow | null, rate_card: RateCardRow | null }`.
2. Helper `packages/domain/src/transport-lanes/cost-estimator.ts` exports `estimateFreightCost(lane, rateCard, shipmentDetails)` computing per_km × distance / per_shipment / per_kg × weight per rate_type — used by IST create form to display suggested transfer_cost.
3. Tests: happy path returns lane+rate, no-lane path returns nulls, pending-rate exclusion (rate exists with status='pending' → suggestion returns rate_card=null), inactive-lane exclusion, multi-rate prefers most-recent uploaded_at.

## Files
- apps/web/app/api/lanes/suggest/route.ts [create]
- packages/domain/src/transport-lanes/cost-estimator.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/lanes/suggest/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/domain/__tests__/transport-lanes/cost-estimator.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given a lane exists active=true from_site=X to_site=Y with one active rate_card, when suggestLane(X, Y) is called, then response is {lane: {...}, rate_card: {...}} (200).
2. Given no lane exists for (X, Y), when suggestLane(X, Y) is called, then response is {lane: null, rate_card: null} (200; the caller gracefully handles).
3. Given a lane exists but only rate_cards with approval_status='pending', when suggestLane runs, then rate_card is null (V-MS-26 — pending rates excluded).
4. Given two rate_cards both active for the same lane, when suggestLane runs, then the one with the most recent uploaded_at wins.
5. Given estimateFreightCost(lane{distance_km:100}, rateCard{rate_type:'per_km', rate_value:2.5}), when called, then returns 250.
6. Given route handler runs without x-site-id header in a multi-site user context, then 400 SITE_CONTEXT_REQUIRED is returned (V-MS-15 enforced via with-site-context-route).

## Test strategy
- RED: integration test all 6 ACs before route exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/api/lanes/suggest/__tests__/route.test.ts' + 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/domain test transport-lanes/cost-estimator'.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass V-MS-26 — must filter out approval_status='pending' rate cards (rely on partial index from T-013 + explicit WHERE clause).
- Do not call this route without withSiteContext wrapping — RLS isolation must hold; the route relies on app.current_site_id() from the active session to enforce site-scoped RLS downstream.
- Do not return a lane with active=false — UX would offer a decommissioned route.
- Do not couple cost estimator to a specific currency — assume rate_card.currency; conversion happens in 10-FIN (P2).
- Do not log full rate-card payload at info level — has commercially sensitive carrier pricing; redact via T-117 allowlist.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Observability redact allowlist for rate-card pricing data.

Cross-mod dep to 00-foundation T-125 declared (withOrgContext + app.current_org_id() per F11 rule). withSiteContext composes on top of T-125; route requires withSiteContext wrapping per risk red-line.

acceptance_criteria: Given a lane exists active=true from_site=X to_site=Y with one active rate_card, when suggestLane(X,Y) called, then response {lane:{...}, rate_card:{...}} (200); AND given no lane exists for (X,Y) when suggestLane called then {lane:null, rate_card:null} (200).

Given a lane exists but only rate_cards with approval_status='pending', when suggestLane runs, then rate_card=null (V-MS-26); AND given two rate_cards both active for same lane when suggestLane runs then the one with most recent uploaded_at returned.
Given route handler runs without x-site-id header in multi-site user context, then 400 SITE_CONTEXT_REQUIRED returned (V-MS-15).
